name: On Time Medi Transport
districts_or_customers: Ohio Medicaid NEMT (van-based, not K-12 yellow bus)
recent_news: Active intrastate non-hazmat carrier per FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 3343151); NPI 1528509452 registered as Non-emergency Medical Transport (VAN) in West Chester, OH.
fit_notes: Not a fit: NEMT van operator (Medicaid non-emergency medical), not a school-bus contractor. Outside Summit's K-12 yellow-bus tuck-in thesis despite 'school=1' in source data.

name: Ciufo Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: likely Harford County Public Schools and/or Cecil County Public Schools (Havre de Grace sits on border)
recent_news: No M&A or news found; long-tenured (50+ year) family operation, contact remains Leonard Ciufo at (410) 836-2360.
fit_notes: Marginal fit: 50+ year single-family Maryland school-bus contractor in Summit core MD geography. Very small (employees=3, ~$122K rev) — likely 1-3 buses; would only matter as part of a broader Cecil/Harford rollup; founder-age succession upside.

name: Mac KALL School Bus Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: likely Calvert County Public Schools (Huntingtown is in Calvert County)
recent_news: No web presence, news, or M&A activity found; appears to be a single-route owner-operator LLC tied to Calvert County's contractor model (similar pattern to neighboring Charles/St. Mary's county contractors).
fit_notes: Likely too small for standalone tuck-in (single-LLC, 3 employees); only relevant as a route in a Calvert County multi-contractor consolidation play. MD MSBCA contractor pattern (1-3 buses per LLC).

name: Mullinix Bus Svc
principals: Mullinix family (Keith Mullinix associated via K A M Enterprises Inc, Howard County contractor)
districts_or_customers: Carroll County Public Schools (likely); Union Bridge, MD
recent_news: 60+ year-old family operation; D&B / Manta lists ~$362K revenue and ~10 staff; no M&A activity found. Related Mullinix-family entity (K A M Enterprises) also runs school routes for HCPSS.
fit_notes: Modest tuck-in candidate: multi-generational MD school-bus family with Carroll + possible Howard County exposure via affiliated Mullinix entities; classic succession profile. Sub-scale alone (~10 employees, ~$360K rev) but interesting if combined with related family entities.

name: Charles County Sch Bus Contrs
owner_or_parent: Charles County School Bus Contractors Association (trade association)
service_types: trade association / collective of 24 independent school bus contractors serving Charles County Public Schools
districts_or_customers: Charles County Public Schools (~23,000 students, 250+ buses)
recent_news: Active association (24 member contractors) operating 250+ buses for CCPS; periodic contract negotiations with CCPS (2023 hours/pay increase reported via SOMDNews/WJLA). Not an operating company.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target — this is the Charles County School Bus Contractors Association (trade group / collective), not an operating contractor. However, its 24 member LLCs (Koch Trucking, Swann Transportation, Dyson Bus Service, Compton, Keller, Alpert, etc.) collectively represent a meaningful MD consolidation opportunity for Summit; pursue the member entities individually rather than the association.
